excerpt.as_written: ܠܗ ܗܘ ܒܥܝ ܘܐܬܟܫܦ. ܕܖ̈ܚܡܐ ܢܬܝܗ̈ܒܘܢ ܠܢܦ̈ܫ ܕܟ܀

contents.label: [27 Kānūn II (January), Departure of St John Chrysostom ]
note: [Canon, mode 1]: Odes 7 (acephalous, continues from Or. 8607, f. 27v), 8, 9

contents.label: 28 Kānūn II (January), St Ephrem, the Teacher of the Syrians
2 Shbāṭ (February), Our Lord’s Entrance to the Temple
note: Troparion on God is the Lord, mode 1 (f. 4v)
Canon by Father Cosmas of Jerusalem, mode 3 (ff. 8r–11r): Odes 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9

contents.label: 24 Shbāṭ (February), the Second Discovery of the Head of St. John the Baptist
note: Troparion on God is the Lord, mode 2 (f. 11r–v)

contents.label: 9 Ādar (March), Forty Martyrs
note: Troparion on God is the Lord, mode 1 (f. 15r–v)

contents.label: 25 Ādar (March), Annunciation
note: Troparion on God is the Lord, mode 4 (f. 19v)

contents.label: [23] Nīsān (April), St George
note: Troparion on God is the Lord, mode 4 (f. 25r)
Another canon by Father Cosmas of Jerusalem, mode 4 (ff. 30v–33v): Odes 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9

contents.label: 25 Nīsān (April), St. Mark Apostle and Evangelist
note: Troparion on God is the Lord, mode 3 (incipit only) (f. 33v)
Exapostilarion – the same as for Apostles in general (no text) (f. 38r)

contents.label: 6 Īyār (May), the Righteous Job
note: Troparion on God is the Lord, mode 2 (incipit only) (f. 38r)

contents.label: 7 Īyār (May), Apparition of the Holy Cross in Jerusalem
note: Troparion on God is the Lord, mode 1 (incipit only) (f. 42v)

contents.label: 8 Īyār (May), St John the Apostle, Theologian and Evangelist and Hosios Arsenius
note: Troparion on God is the Lord to the Apostle, mode 2 (f. 47r)
Troparion on God is the Lord to the Hosios, mode 2 (f. 47r)
Stichera to the Apostle, various modes (ff. 47v–49r)
Canon, mode 8 (ff. 49v–54v): Odes 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9 (alternating odes of two canons, those to St John the Apostle and Hosios Arsenius)

contents.label: 9 Īyār (May), Holy Martyr Christopher
note: Troparion on God is the Lord, mode 3 (incipit only) (f. 54v)

contents.label: 12 Īyār (May), Epiphanius, Bishop of Cyprus
note: Kathisma on God is the Lord, mode 4 (incipit only) (f. 59r)

contents.label: 24 Īyār (May), Hosios St. Symeon the Stylite who performed miracles in the sea, from God’s city of Antioch in Syria
note: Troparion on God is the Lord, mode 1 (incipit only) (f. 63v)

contents.label: 8 Ḥazīrān (June), Holy Martyr Theodore
note: Troparion on God is the Lord, mode 2 (f. 70r)
Canon, composition by the priest Father John bar Manṣūr Damascene (ff. 71r–74r): Odes 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9

contents.label: 12 Ḥazīrān (June), Hosios Onuphrius
note: Troparion on God is the Lord, mode 1 (incipit only) (f. 74r)

contents.label: 14 Ḥazīrān (June), Dormition of Prophet Elisha
note: Kathisma on God is the Lord, mode 2 (incipit only) (f. 78v)

contents.label: 18 Ḥazīrān (June), Holy Martyr Leontius
note: Kathisma on God is the Lord, mode 3 (incipit only) (f. 83r)

contents.label: 24 Ḥazīrān (June), Nativity of St John the Baptist
note: Kathisma on God is the Lord, mode 4 (f. 86v)
Canon, composition by Father Cosmas of Jerusalem, mode 4 (ff. 89r–92v): Odes 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9

contents.label: 29 Ḥazīrān (June), the Chief Apostles Peter and Paul
note: Troparion on God is the Lord, mode 4 (f. 92v)
Canon on the Chief Apostle Peter, composition by Father John Damascene, mode 4 (ff. 97v–100v): Odes 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9
Canon on the Apostle Paul, composition by Father John Damascene, mode 8 (ff. 100v–104v): Odes 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9

contents.label: 30 Ḥazīrān (June), 12 Apostles
note: Canon to the 12 Apostles and the Chief Apostles Peter and Paul, mode 4 (ff. 105v–109v): Odes 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9 (alternating odes of the two canons)

contents.label: 5 Tammūz (July), Dormition of the Holy Mother of St Symeon the Wonderworker and Stylite
note: Troparion on God is the Lord, mode 2 (incipit only) (f. 109v)
Canon, composition by Joseph the Greek, mode 4 (ff. 111r–114v): Odes 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9

contents.label: 8 Tammūz (July), Holy Martyr Procopius
note: Troparion on God is the Lord, mode 3 (incipit only) (f. 114v)

contents.label: 15 Tammūz (July), Holy Martyrs Cyricus and his mother Julitta
note: Kathisma on God is the Lord, mode 5 (incipit only) (f. 118v)

contents.label: 20 Tammūz (July), Ascension of the Holy Prophet Elijah
note: Troparion on God is the Lord, mode 3 (f. 123r)

contents.label: 27 Tammūz (July), Holy Martyr Panteleimon
note: Troparion on God is the Lord, mode 3 (incipit only) (f. 129v)

contents.label: [1] (lit.: Beginning of) Āb (August), Holy Martyr Shmūnī and her Seven Sons (= the Maccabean Martyrs)
note: Troparion on God is the Lord, mode 1 (f. 134r)
Canon, mode 4, composition by Father John bar Manṣūr Damascene (ff. 135r–139r): Odes 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9

contents.label: 6 Āb (August), the Transfiguration of our Lord on Mt Tabor
note: Troparion on God is the Lord, mode 7 (f. 139r–v)
Canon, mode 4, composition by Father Cosmas of Jerusalem (ff. 144r–147v): Odes 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9
Another canon, mode 8, composition by Father John Damascene bar Manṣūr (ff. 147v–151r): Odes 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9

contents.label: 7 Āb (August), Hosios Dometius
note: Kathisma on God is the Lord, mode 2 (incipit only) (f. 151v)

contents.label: 15 Āb (August), the Dormition of the Mother of God
note: Troparion on God is the Lord, mode 1 (f. 156r)
Stichera, various modes (some: compositions by Father John Damascene bar Manṣūr) (ff. 157v–164r)
Canon, mode 1, composition by Father John bar Manṣūr, the Priest (ff. 164r–167v): Odes 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9
Another canon on the Mother of God, mode 4, composition by Father Cosmas (ff. 167v–170v): Odes 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9
(Text on ff. 170v (lower part of folio)–172v added in a different hand)

contents.label: 29 Āb (August), Decollation of St John the Baptist
